mapper.sql: select id, refund_no, member_id, member_name, member_phone, store_id, store_name, refund_amount, refund_reason, refund_remark, store_approver, finance_approver, process_instance_id, process_definition_key, workflow_status, current_task_name, submitter, submit_time, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from mem_refund_apply
mapper.select:
del_flag = '0' and refund_no like concat('%', #{refundNo}, '%') and member_name like concat('%', #{memberName}, '%') and store_name like concat('%', #{storeName}, '%') and workflow_status = #{workflowStatus}
order by id desc
mapper.insert: insert into mem_refund_apply( refund_no, member_id, member_name, member_phone, store_id, store_name, refund_amount, refund_reason, refund_remark, store_approver, finance_approver, process_instance_id, process_definition_key, workflow_status, current_task_name, submitter, submit_time, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) values ( #{refundNo}, #{memberId}, #{memberName}, #{memberPhone}, #{storeId}, #{storeName}, #{refundAmount}, #{refundReason}, #{refundRemark}, #{storeApprover}, #{financeApprover}, #{processInstanceId}, #{processDefinitionKey}, #{workflowStatus}, #{currentTaskName}, #{submitter}, #{submitTime}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.update:
update mem_refund_apply set del_flag = '2', update_time = sysdate() where id in
#{id}
